title: oxalis clematodes
intro: Oxalis clematides, also known as yellow wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Oxalis clematides include its ability to treat kidney stones, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism and gout. The herbal preparations of Oxalis clematides can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
